name: Bald Hills Wind Farm
current_developer: Bald Hills Wind Farm Pty Ltd
notable: 107 MW, 52 Senvion MM92-2050 turbines in South Gippsland, VIC. Developed by Mitsui & Co; acquired by Infrastructure Capital Group (ICG) in 2017. COD May 2015. One of Victoria's southernmost large wind farms.

timeline.title: Federal approval refused
timeline.detail: Environment Minister Ian Campbell refused EPBC approval citing migratory birds

timeline.title: Revised federal approval
timeline.detail: EPBC approval granted after Federal Court challenge and project modifications

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Mitsui commenced construction; VCAT ordered approval of development plans

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.
